creator: dcs@newsguy.com
text:
To be honest, I suspect something in your hardware. I have never
seen such complains, and the fickle nature of the problem points
very, very strongly to hardware problems.

--
Daniel C. Sobral			(8-DCS)
dcs@newsguy.com
dcs@freebsd.org

	"If at first you don't succeed, skydiving is not for you."
